down-select to 9 regions (Oct 2024); de Gerlache Rim 2 retained, Shackleton-adjacent dropped

Shackleton-de Gerlache ridge 'strong candidate for lunar field station'; CR slopes <10 deg
illumination tables: Shackleton + CR at surface/2 m; CR C1 = max at either pole
